summary: Missing IAM permission for the new JWT secret in the existing service secrets statement will cause task startup failures.

issues.description: The new Secrets Manager secret is not included in the existing `DixieServiceSecrets` statement, so the ECS execution role may still be denied access depending on which statement ECS uses for secret resolution. This causes task start failures with AccessDenied when fetching `DIXIE_JWT_PRIVATE_KEY`.
issues.explanation: Including the new JWT secret ARN in the existing service secrets policy ensures the ECS execution role can retrieve all secrets needed by the task, preventing AccessDenied errors at startup.
